targets.query:
from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "switch_port_metrics" and
    r._field == "status" and
    r.switch == "icx8100"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["port"])
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "switch_port_metrics" and
    r._field == "status" and
    r.switch == "icx8100"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["port"])
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 0)
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "switch_port_metrics" and
    r._field == "status" and
    r.switch == "icx8100"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["port"])
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 2)
  |> group()
  |> count()

  |> group(columns: ["port"])

options.siteConfig:
---
colors:
  up: "#00c853"
  empty: "#708090"

cellColorMappings:
  darkTheme:
    up: up
    empty: empty

thresholds:
  operstatus:
    - { color: up, level: 1 }   # up
    - { color: empty, level: 2}   # empty

targets.query:
from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "switch_port_metrics" and
    r._field == "status" and
    r.switch == "icx8200"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["port"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "port"])

options.siteConfig:
---
colors:
  up: "#00c853"
  empty: "#708090"

cellColorMappings:
  darkTheme:
    up: up
    empty: empty

thresholds:
  operstatus:
    - { color: up, level: 1 }   # up
    - { color: empty, level: 2 }   # empty

targets.query:
from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "switch_port_metrics" and
    r._field == "status" and
    r.switch == "icx8200"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["port"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "port"])

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "ruckus_ap_metrics" and
    r._field == "channel_utilization_5ghz"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["ap_name"])
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 75)
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "ruckus_ap_metrics" and
    r._field == "status"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["ap_name"])
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 0)
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["ap_name", "_time"])
  |> sort(columns: ["ap_name"])

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "ruckus_ap_metrics" and
    r._field == "status"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["ap_name"])
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 0)
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["ap_name", "_time"])
  |> sort(columns: ["ap_name"])

last_utilization = from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruckus_ap_metrics" and r._field == "channel_utilization_5ghz")
  |> group(columns: ["ap_name"])
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 75)
  |> keep(columns: ["ap_name", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "utilization"})

last_client_count = from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruckus_ap_metrics" and r._field == "client_count")
  |> group(columns: ["ap_name"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["ap_name", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "clients"})

join(
  tables: {util: last_utilization, clients: last_client_count},
  on: ["ap_name"]
)
|> sort(columns: ["utilization"], desc: true)
|> group()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "ruckus_ap_metrics" and
    r._field == "channel_utilization_5ghz"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["ap_name"])
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 75)
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "environment" and
    r._field == "temperature" and
    r.location == "server_room"
  )
  |> group()
  |> last()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "environment" and
    r._field == "temperature" and
    r.location == "server_room"
  )
  |> group()
  |> mean()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "environment" and
    r._field == "temperature" and
    r.location == "server_room"
  )
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(
    every: v.windowPeriod,
    fn: mean,
    createEmpty: false
  )
  |> yield(name: "mean_temperature")

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "environment" and
    r._field == "temperature" and
    r.location == "server_room"
  )
  |> max()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "environment" and
    r._field == "temperature" and
    r.location == "server_room"
  )
  |> group()
  |> min()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "environment" and
    r._field == "humidity" and
    r.location == "server_room"
  )
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(
    every: v.windowPeriod,
    fn: mean,
    createEmpty: false
  )
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "environment" and
    r._field == "humidity" and
    r.location == "server_room"
  )
  |> group()
  |> last()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "environment" and
    r._field == "humidity" and
    r.location == "server_room"
  )
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
